title: SCP-705, Militaristic Play-Doh
description: A children’s toy turned into a full-scale war machine.
body:
Militaristic Play-Doh adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-705, also known as the Militaristic Play-Doh


This anomaly takes the form of Play-Doh Cup in various colors, which can very rarely drop from mobs. When placed and opened, these pods spawn SCP-705 instances that wage war against each other. Colors determine alliances and enemies, with different units spawning depending on the state of the pod. At first, simple Soldiers appear, but over time stronger units such as Tanks or Fighter Jets may join the battlefield. SCP-705 may look like a toy, but once opened, it transforms into a chaotic miniature war.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► How do SCP-705 Instances spawn?

SCP-705 Instances spawn when an SCP-705 Cup is open and a player is nearby. SCP-705 Instances follow a certain order to spawn, depending on how long the cup is open.

At first, only soldiers will spawn. After that, medics and generals can spawn. If a General spawned, soldiers can turn into artillery if there isn't one nearby. Also troops of soldiers can spawn and even snipers. Tanks can spawn aswell but rarely. If a tank already spawned, a fighter jet can appear aswell if there isn't one nearby.

► Why does no SCP-705 Instances spawn?

A player needs to be in a range of 10 blocks to an open SCP-705 Cup to be able to spawn SCP-705 Instances. If the cup closes automatically, it means, there are enemies to close and no SCP-705 Instances of the same color as the cup.

► What does each color targets first?

Each color targets a different color in a specific order and unit.

Green: Brown - Orange - Red - Yellow - Blue - Purple - Pink.

Blue: Yellow - Orange - Red - Purple - Pink - Green - Brown.

Yellow: Blue - Green - Brown - Orange - Red - Purple - Pink.

Red: Orange - Pink - Purple - Yellow - Blue - Green - Brown.

Brown: Green - Purple - Pink - Orange - Red - Yellow -Blue.

Orange: Red - Yellow - Blue - Green - Brown - Purple - Pink.

Pink: Purple - Red - Orange - Blue - Yellow - Brown - Green

Purple: Pink - Brown - Green - Blue - Yellow - Orange - Red

► How can I get an SCP-705 Cup?

Try to kill as many monsters as possible. A Play-Doh Cup can be dropped by killing monsters with a 0.1% chance. 

</details>



![SCP-705](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eec2bf02b6f7297c201f2f4e2ef2beaa10d7948.png)

The Cup serves as the source of SCP-705 instances and can be dropped by monsters when killed with a 0.1% chance. When placed and opened with a right-click, it spawns colored Soldiers and, over time, stronger units. Identical colors form alliances, while different colors are enemies. If all SCP-705 Instances are killed and another color is within 5 block radius, the Cup will close itself, marking the color as defeated. When closed or destroyed, the Cup despawns all of its instances. SCP-705 deal no damage to other mobs and are very fragile and even disolve in water.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
